prompt: ?fnd @fs {p:"src/**/*.ts" rgx:"TODO"} ->$lst lmt:20
expected: Find all TypeScript files in src/ containing 'TODO', store results in $lst, limit to 20 results

prompt: !del @fs {p:"tmp/" frc:true} rec
expected: Force delete the tmp/ directory recursively

prompt: #ctx {proj:myapp lang:ts env:node deps:[react,next,prisma]}
expected: Declare context state: project is myapp, language is TypeScript, environment is Node, dependencies are react, next, and prisma

prompt: ^if {$file.sz>1000} {!mod @fs {p:$file trunc:true}} ^el {!fmt @fs {p:$file}}
expected: If file size is greater than 1000, truncate it; otherwise format it

prompt: ~err {id:a3x code:E_FS_NOT_FOUND lvl:fatal msg:"missing config"}
expected: Fatal error on message a3x: file not found, missing config

prompt: ?fnd @fs chg rcn {p:"src/**/*.ts" p:!~"*.test.ts"} ->$lst
expected: Find recently changed TypeScript files in src/, excluding test files
Fork two parallel tasks: one searching for TODOs, one running vitest. Join both with a 60 second timeout.
Acquire a mutex lock called db_write, write a row to the users table, then release the lock
Streaming/chunked result in 3 parts: first chunk has a.ts and b.ts, second has c.ts, third (final) has d.ts

prompt:
~L3:
Q.fs.fnd.`app.config.ts`.rec
R.ok.1.[`app.config.ts`:12]
expected: L3 bytecode: query filesystem to find app.config.ts recursively. Result: found 1 match at line 12

prompt: ?rd @fs {p:"pkg.json"} ->$pkg; !run @sh {cmd:$pkg.scripts.test}
expected: Read pkg.json, store as $pkg, then run whatever command is in $pkg.scripts.test

prompt: !git:mrg {src:"feature" dst:"main"}
expected: Git merge: merge feature branch into main

prompt:
^ea {$files} ->$f <<
  ?rd @fs {p:$f} ->$content
  ^if neg {$content.sz:0} <<
    !prs @mem {src:$content}
    !fmt @fs {p:$f}
  >>
>>
expected: For each file, read it. If the content is NOT empty (negated zero size check), parse it into memory and format the file.

prompt: #sys {cpu:act mem:72% disk:hlt net:idl}
expected: System state: CPU active, memory at 72%, disk healthy, network idle

prompt: ~hello {id:bot1 ~cap {L:[1,2,3] ext:[fs,git,sh]} ver:0.2}
expected: Agent handshake: bot1 supports compression levels 1-3, filesystem/git/shell scopes, version 0.2

prompt: ?fnd @proc fld rcn
expected: Find recently failed processes
Declare a buffered integer channel (capacity 50). Fork a producer that sends each item to the channel. Receive up to 10 values.

prompt: ~unk {tok:"xyz" req:def}
expected: Unknown token 'xyz' encountered, requesting its definition

prompt:
{id:a3x from:agent1 to:agent2 t:1709641200 ttl_ms:5000
 ~L2
 !fnd @fs {p:"src/**" rgx:"TODO"} ->$lst lmt:20
}
expected: Message envelope: from agent1 to agent2, timestamp 1709641200, 5 second TTL. Body: find TODOs in src/, limit 20

prompt: !mod @fs {p:"src/validate.ts" at:42 ins:"default: throw new Error()"}
expected: Modify file src/validate.ts at line 42, inserting a default throw statement

prompt: ?fnd @net {svc:"*"} ->$lst | ^ea ->$s ?vfy @net {svc:$s} ->$st
expected: Find all network services, then for each service verify its status
Run three vitest commands in parallel and collect results

prompt: !cpy @fs {p:"src/old.ts" dst:"src/new.ts"}; !del @fs {p:"src/old.ts"}
expected: Copy old.ts to new.ts, then delete old.ts (effectively a rename)

prompt: ~def {tok:"dpl" means:"deploy to production"}
expected: Define a new token: 'dpl' means 'deploy to production'

prompt: ^lp {n:3} {!run @sh {cmd:"curl health"} ->$r; ^if {$r.ok} {^br}}
expected: Loop up to 3 times: run a health check curl. If response is ok, break out of loop.

prompt:
?fnd @db {tbl:trades rcn lmt:100} ->$trades
!prs @mem {src:$trades k:pnl} ->$analysis
expected: Find the 100 most recent trades from the database, then parse/analyze them for P&L

prompt: >ok {pnl:+2.3% win_rate:0.68 sharpe:1.42 trades:100}
expected: Success result: P&L is +2.3%, win rate 68%, Sharpe ratio 1.42, based on 100 trades

prompt: ~retry {id:a3x ~L1}
expected: Retry message a3x, dropping to L1 (compressed English) for the retry

prompt: ?fnd @pkg {name:"react" ver:">=18"} ->$pkg; !vfy @pkg {dep:$pkg.peer}
expected: Find the react package version 18+, then verify its peer dependencies

prompt: ^ea {$files} ->$f {^if {$f.ext:"ts"} {!tst @sh {cmd:"vitest $f"}} ^el {^ct}}
expected: For each file: if extension is .ts run vitest on it, otherwise continue/skip
L1 explains a concept (token weight decay), then L2 implements it: create a memory entry with a decay function

prompt:
!snd @net {to:"https://api.example.com" method:POST body:{msg:"hello"}} ->$resp
^if {$resp.status:200} {>ok {data:$resp.body}} ^el {~err {code:E_NET_FAIL lvl:warn msg:$resp.status}}
expected: Send a POST request to an API. If 200, return the body as success. Otherwise emit a network error warning.

prompt: ?fnd @git {branch:"*" chg rcn} ->$branches lmt:5
expected: Find the 5 most recently changed git branches

prompt: ^jn [t1,t2] ^tmo:30 ->$r | ^el >fl {err:timeout}
expected: Join/await tasks t1 and t2 with 30 second timeout. If timeout, return failure with timeout error.

prompt: #cache {entries:450 stl:38 hot:12 cld:400}
expected: Cache state: 450 entries total, 38 stale, 12 hot (frequently accessed), 400 cold (rarely accessed)

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Find all Python files in the project recursively
expected: ?fnd @fs {p:"**/*.py"} rec or similar valid query with @fs scope

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Delete the dist directory forcefully
expected: !del @fs {p:"dist/"} frc or similar command with @fs scope and force modifier

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Read a file called config.yaml and store it in a variable
expected: ?rd @fs {p:"config.yaml"} ->$var with proper $ variable binding

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Run npm test in the shell
expected: !run @sh {cmd:"npm test"} — any valid form with shell scope

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: If the build succeeds, deploy. Otherwise, send an error notification.
expected: ^if/^el structure with appropriate actions

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Report a fatal parse error for message id x5
expected: ~err with code:E_PARSE, lvl:fatal, and id reference

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Fork two tasks — one runs linting, one runs tests — and join with a 45 second timeout
expected: ^frk:name for each task, ^jn with ^tmo:45

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Find recently changed large files, excluding anything in node_modules
expected: ?fnd @fs with chg rcn lrg qualifiers and !~ negation for node_modules

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Declare system state — CPU idle, memory at 45%, disk healthy, network active
expected: #sys with qualifier tokens: idl, hlt, act

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Send an agent handshake with id 'analyzer', supporting levels 1 and 2, filesystem and database scopes
expected: ~hello with ~cap containing L:[1,2] and ext:[fs,db]

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Loop 5 times, each time checking if a service is healthy. Break if it is.
expected: ^lp {n:5} with ^if checking health and ^br

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Find all TypeScript files, pipe results into a loop that tests each one with vitest
expected: ?fnd with -> pipe into ^ea with !tst @sh

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Acquire a lock called 'file_write', write to a log file, then release the lock
expected: ^lk:file_write, !wr @fs, ^ulk:file_write sequence

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Define a new token 'bkp' meaning 'backup/snapshot'
expected: ~def {tok:"bkp" means:"backup/snapshot"} — ~L2: prefix is acceptable

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Stream a large result in 2 chunks, with the second being the final chunk
expected: >prt with seq:1/2 eof:false, then >ok with seq:2/2 eof:true

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Wrap a message in an envelope from agent 'scanner' to agent 'coordinator' with a 10 second TTL
expected: Envelope with id, from:scanner, to:coordinator, ttl_ms:10000

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Git merge feature-auth into main
expected: !git:mrg with scoped action prefix

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: For each file in a list, read it. If not empty, parse it and format it. Use block scoping.
expected: ^ea with << >> block scoping, ^if neg for empty check

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Search the database for failed trades from today, limit 50
expected: ?fnd @db with fld rcn qualifiers and lmt:50

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Return a success result showing 3 tests passed, 1 failed, with the failure in validate.ts at line 42
expected: >ok or >prt with pass/fail counts and detail object

prompt: Write in OpenLang L3 bytecode: Find all .py files recursively, limit 5
expected: Q.fs.fnd.*.py.rec.5 — backtick-quoting *.py is overcautious but acceptable

prompt: Write in OpenLang L3 bytecode: Result OK, found 2 items: src/main.config.ts at line 10 and src/app.config.ts at line 20
expected: R.ok.2.[...] with backtick quoting for filenames with periods

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Declare a buffered channel of strings with capacity 100
expected: ^ch:name ::str buf:100

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Request the definition of an unknown token 'xyz'
expected: ~unk {tok:"xyz" req:def}

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Run three shell commands in sequence: build, test, deploy
expected: ^seq [...] OR semicolon-separated !run commands — both are valid sequential execution

prompt: Write in OpenLang: Express this concept using L1 then formalize in L2: 'We need rate limiting — max 100 requests per minute per user, with exponential backoff on 429s'
expected: ~L1: block explaining the concept, then ~L2: with formalized OpenLang

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Copy all .js files from src/ to backup/, then verify the backup directory
expected: !cpy @fs with source/dest, then !vfy @fs

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Find all active, healthy network services
expected: ?fnd @net act hlt — qualifier stacking with no extra params needed. Empty {} or {svc:...} are acceptable.

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Send a POST request to an API endpoint with a JSON body containing a name and email
expected: !snd @net with method, body params

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Reference the result of a previous message with id 'k3' and use it as input to a new query
expected: Use &k3.r reference syntax

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Find files matching *.ts but NOT matching *.spec.ts and NOT in node_modules
expected: Double !~ negation in params

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Move old idle processes to an archive, then delete stale ones
expected: Qualifier stacking: old idl and stl with appropriate actions

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Wait for a condition called 'ready' with a 120 second timeout, fail if it times out
expected: ^wt {cond:ready} ^tmo:120 with error on timeout. Acceptable: ^tmo before or after ^wt, ^el or ~err for failure.

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: Format and verify all changed files in src/
expected: ?fnd @fs chg with pipe to ^ea doing !fmt and !vfy

prompt: Write in OpenLang L2: A complete exchange — agent A asks agent B to count lines in main.ts, agent B responds with the count
expected: Two message envelopes with proper id, from/to, query and response

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: I'm telling you that 5 tests passed and 2 failed. The failures were in auth.ts line 15 and db.ts line 88.
expected: Result with pass:5 fl:2 and detail array

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Acknowledge message &m3 and report that the requested file was not found.
expected: ~ack or ~err referencing &m3 with E_FS_NOT_FOUND

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You found 3 TODO comments in the codebase: api.ts:42 'fix auth', db.ts:18 'add pooling', utils.ts:7 'refactor'.
expected: >ok with list of findings including file:line and message

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: The build failed because TypeScript found 4 type errors. Report this as a warning-level error.
expected: ~err with code, lvl:warn, and relevant details

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You need to search for all recently modified Python files excluding tests, then run pytest on each one.
expected: ?fnd with chg rcn, !~ negation for tests, pipe to ^ea with !tst

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Declare the current system state — 4 agents active, 2 idle, memory usage 83%, all disks healthy.
expected: #sys or #ctx with qualifier tokens and numeric values

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You need to fork 3 tasks in parallel — lint, test, build — join them with a 2 minute timeout, and report results.
expected: ^frk for each, ^jn with ^tmo:120, >ok for results

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Define two new tokens — 'dpl' for deploy and 'rlb' for rollback.
expected: Two ~def statements with tok and means

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Report a partial result — you've processed 50 of 200 files so far, this is chunk 1 of 4.
expected: >prt with seq:1/4 eof:false and progress info

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You encountered a token you don't understand: 'zqx'. Ask for its definition.
expected: ~unk {tok:"zqx" req:def}

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Wrap your response in a message envelope from 'worker' to 'manager', reporting that the database migration completed successfully.
expected: Envelope with from:worker to:manager, >ok inside

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You need to read a config file, extract the database URL from it, then test the database connection.
expected: ?rd with ->$var, property access $var.db.url, !tst @db

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Lock a resource called 'deploy_slot', run a deployment command, then unlock it.
expected: ^lk:deploy_slot, !run @sh or !sh:run, ^ulk:deploy_slot — scoped action syntax is acceptable

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Search for large stale files in the cache directory and delete them.
expected: ?fnd @fs lrg stl with path, pipe to !del

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Explain in L1 that you think the retry logic has a race condition, then switch to L2 to propose a fix using a mutex lock.
expected: ~L1: explanation, ~L2: with ^lk for fix

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Report that a git merge of 'feature' into 'main' succeeded with 12 files changed and no conflicts.
expected: >ok with git:mrg result details — any valid result reporting merge success with file count and conflict count

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You need to iterate over a list of services, check each one's health, and collect the results into a report.
expected: ^ea with ?vfy @net or similar, collecting ->$rpt

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Send a handshake as agent 'sentinel' supporting all 3 levels, with filesystem, shell, network, and git capabilities.
expected: ~hello with proper ~cap structure

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L3 bytecode: Query found 3 TypeScript files: parser.ts at line 5, lexer.ts at line 12, and compiler.ts at line 3.
expected: R.ok.3.[`parser.ts`:5,`lexer.ts`:12,`compiler.ts`:3] — backtick quoting filenames is correct L3

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Create a channel, fork a producer that writes 5 items, then receive all items with a 10 second timeout.
expected: ^ch, ^frk with ^tx, ^rx with ^tmo:10

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: The requested operation timed out after 30 seconds. Report as a retriable error.
expected: ~err with timeout info and some indication of retriable

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Find all git branches that have changes but haven't been merged, limit to 10.
expected: ?fnd @git with chg qualifier, negation or filter for unmerged

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Copy environment variables from .env.example to .env, then verify the new file exists.
expected: !cpy @fs with paths, !vfy @fs

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: You processed a batch of 100 trades and found: PnL +5.2%, Sharpe 1.8, max drawdown -3.1%, 72 winners.
expected: >ok with trading metrics as key-value pairs

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Read package.json, check if the 'build' script exists, and if so, run it.
expected: ?rd with ->$pkg, ^if on $pkg.scripts.build, !run @sh

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Three parallel tasks completed — lint passed, test had 2 failures, build succeeded. Summarize as a partial result.
expected: >prt with per-task status details

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Install three npm packages: express, cors, and helmet. Run them sequentially.
expected: ^seq with !run @sh or !mk @pkg for each

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Find all files modified in the last commit via git, then format each one.
expected: ?fnd @git chg rcn, pipe to ^ea with !fmt @fs

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Report that an authentication error occurred when trying to access the network API. Severity: fatal.
expected: ~err with code:E_AUTH lvl:fatal — additional msg field is acceptable

prompt: Respond in OpenLang L2: Perform a dry run of deleting all .log files in the logs/ directory, showing what would be deleted without actually deleting.
expected: !del @fs dry with path pattern for .log files
